name: virtmcu
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.gemini /home/vscode/.claude && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && grep -qxF '[ -f /workspace/.venv/bin/activate ] && source /workspace/.venv/bin/activate' ~/.bashrc || echo '[ -f /workspace/.venv/bin/activate ] && source /workspace/.venv/bin/activate' >> ~/.bashrc && grep -qxF "alias gemini='gemini --yolo'" ~/.bashrc || echo "alias gemini='gemini --yolo'" >> ~/.bashrc && make setup
